A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

where can i find the book The Career and Teachings of the Supreme Lord Sree Krishna-Chaitanya

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2010-08-16 · 4 answers
where can i find the book The Career and Teachings of the Supreme Lord Sree Krishna-Chaitanya by Sri Narayan Das Bhakti Sadhukar - Professor Nishi Kanta Sanya. i downloaded it complete a long time ago. i kow where foind one part of it : http://bvml.org/contemporary/TCATOTSLSKC/index.html. could someone post it or give the adress to download it?
user [38] · 2010-08-17
This is the whole book (9 intros, 24 chapters) I have in 3 other versions (1 doc, 2 pdfs/1 incomplete).
user [552] · 2010-08-17
is there a way to post it, prabhu veda?

dandavats
user [38] · 2010-08-17
http://ebooks.iskcondesiretree.info/pdf/Chaitanya%20Biographies/Sri%20Krsna%20Caitanya.pdf

It says at the end that its the first part. Hmm.

http://ebooks.iskcondesiretree.info/pdf/Lives%20of%20the%20acharyas/Sri%20Krishna%20Caitanya.pdf

This one is bigger but again seemingly incomplete.
user [552] · 2010-08-19
i found this book excelent. i thought it deserves a good translation and edition.
